project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Slb RIH with Welltec milling BHA. At 1700ft, beaned up. Observed large tension drop so POOH. Second attempt to RIH and had a similar result, so pulled into catcher and been flowing since 03:30. WSS crew change this morning so will continue after lunch. Lookahead has 4th July for MFC but TBC.
